mapping_policy: CMT mappings are downstream of MIPVU. Every non-exploratory mapping must cite metaphor-related or uncertain MIPVU lexical units from the same sentence.

mappings.evidence_span: It is the straight road to barbarism.
entailments: war outcome or moral trajectory is represented through seasonal change or travel
Victory and moral danger are understood through journey or seasonal transition.
mappings.rival_reading: The political-military process is not literal travel or weather.
mappings.justification: MIPVU review rule 'wwi-road-season-victory' marked 1 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.

mappings.evidence_span: I will go beyond that, and I will say that if you turn two million men — forced, conscript, compelled, driven — into the field, you will always get amongst them a certain number who will do things that the nation to which they belong would be ashamed of.
entailments: nation, civilization, or personhood is explicitly compared to a machine
Political society and personhood are understood through machinery.
mappings.rival_reading: The target is a political community or human being, not literal machinery.
mappings.justification: MIPVU review rule 'wwi-machine-society' marked 1 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.

mappings.evidence_span: Russia has made sacrifices for freedom — great sacrifices.
entailments: wartime service or loss is framed as sacrifice for freedom, country, or allies
Wartime obligation is understood through sacrificial offering.
mappings.rival_reading: The passage concerns civic and military cost rather than a literal ritual offering.
mappings.justification: MIPVU review rule 'wwi-sacrifice-service' marked 2 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.

mappings.evidence_span: I am also delighted to find here men who have been fighting political battles against me The task we have in hand is not the task of one party or of two parties, but a task for the nation as a whole, and we wish to preserve absolute na- tional unity until we secure national strength.

mappings.evidence_span: While it is on, the strength of a country is diverted to the internal conflict which is raging in its blood, and it is naturally not so effective for external use during that period.

mappings.evidence_span: Meanwhile, France, Italy, and ourselves have to bear the greatest share of the burden, and I should like to say to those who hailed the Rus- sian Revolution with delight as well as condemn- ing and doing their best to thwart the military efforts of their own country, that but for these military efforts the Russian Revolution would have had no chance to fructify.
